rationale: All sdk entries trace to uuid <14.0.0 (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq: missing bounds check in v3/v5/v6 when buf is provided). Not exploitable here: jayson only calls v4(), rpc-websockets only calls v1(). No fix path exists — uuid 14 is ESM-only but jayson requires CJS, and @solana/web3.js 2.x is canary-only. Re-evaluate when @solana/web3.js ships a stable release that drops uuid <14.

sdk.reason: Transitively includes uuid <14.0.0 via @solana/web3.js dependency chain; no non-breaking remediation path yet.

uuid 14 migration is tied to @solana/web3.js 2.x canary; stable CJS-compatible upgrade path is not yet available.
jayson remains on uuid <14 and CJS import path; upstream dependency movement is pending stable ecosystem support.
rpc-websockets currently depends on uuid <14 and only uses non-affected UUID path in this repo's dependency graph.
Known uuid <14 advisory tracked with bounded expiry while waiting for stable dependency upgrades.
